rationale: Review 1's two concrete fixes (replace fragile rw [IsUnipotent] with simp [IsUnipotent] on the only nontrivial proof at line 55, and delete the no-op theorem at line 73 whose body is literally the class field's True) are real, directly visible in the diff, and directly improve proof quality by making the proof robust and removing a meaningless stub. Review 2's 'approve' lets both flaws through, producing a measurably weaker merged PR.
